value: Decision Case Studies
Real founder moments, broken down step by step.
We walk through real founder moments step by step.
For example:
Each case study breaks down what was happening, what was at risk, what options were on the table, what was chosen, and what changed.
A CPA deciding whether launching a podcast would actually build authority or just drain time
A dermatologist navigating a potential celebrity collaboration and how to price it
A small product brand debating wholesale versus doubling down on direct-to-consumer
A service-based founder considering whether to fire their biggest but most exhausting client
